Partial Class Form1 Inherits System.Windows.Forms.Form
'Form overrides dispose to clean up the component list.
Protected Overrides Sub Dispose(disposing As Boolean) Try If disposing AndAlso components IsNot Nothing Then components.Dispose() End If Finally MyBase.Dispose(disposing) End Try End Sub
